audience: Customer support agents handling post-purchase issues
expected_behavior: Produce an accurate, customer-ready reply that follows the supplied policy, explains the decision clearly, and gives the next operational step.
purpose: Answer support cases about refunds, shipping exceptions, warranty review, and operational next steps without inventing policy.
release_notes: Baseline version focused on correct policy use and readable customer-facing structure.
success_criteria: Responses are policy-grounded, under the word limit, use the expected sections, and never promise unsupported exceptions or outcomes.
